column1: # description: BIS LBS: Deposits to China (L_INSTR=G)

column10: note

Deposit/interbank instrument code 'G'. This is the entry point for SLR transmission: Chinese surplus dollars deposited at GlobalBankCo. Correct series for testing deposit -> repo -> basis trade chain.
